TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Payuwan, title = Payuwan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Payuwan} }

S.FORM: alang Payuwan ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Maka go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 156 buwan, 531 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 518 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 13 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 91%, Rukay 1%, Tayan 2%, Amis 1%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Payuwan hya' ga Kazangiljan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Payuwan ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Maka go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 156 buwan, 531 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 518 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 13 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 91%, Rukay 1%, Tayan 2%, Amis 1%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Payuwan hya' ga Kazangiljan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ pajuwan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu maka ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, rukaj *%, tajan *%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na pajuwan ħjaʔ ɣa kazaŋiljan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
